docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY BRIGHT, JACOB ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, SAMSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, SAMSON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-24-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, SAMSON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MCGILL. PLAINTIFF JACOB ANDREW BRIGHT IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS FREDRICK SANTANA. DEFENDANT SAMSON TAM IS PRESENT WHO IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY BRIGHT, JACOB ANDREW TAM, SAMSON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIGHT, JACOB ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, SAMSON $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
